mapper.sql: MEMBER_NO, ORG_NO, MEMBER_ID_ENC, MEMBER_NM, MEMBER_STS_CD, JOIN_DT, LEAVE_DT, LAST_CONTACT_DT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DT, LAST_MOD_USER_ID, LAST_MOD_DT
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from t_member_mst
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_member_mst
MEMBER_NO,
ORG_NO,
MEMBER_ID_ENC,
MEMBER_NM,
MEMBER_STS_CD,
JOIN_DT,
LEAVE_DT,
LAST_CONTACT_DT,
REG_USER_ID,
REG_DT,
LAST_MOD_USER_ID,
LAST_MOD_DT,
#{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{memberStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastContactDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update t_member_mst
MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_NM = #{row.memberNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_STS_CD = #{row.memberStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JOIN_DT = #{row.joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_DT = #{row.leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_CONTACT_DT = #{row.lastContactDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update t_member_mst set MEMBER_NO = #{row.memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ORG_NO = #{row.orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{row.memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_NM = #{row.memberNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_STS_CD = #{row.memberStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DT = #{row.joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_DT = #{row.leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_CONTACT_DT = #{row.lastContactDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{row.regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{row.regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{row.lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{row.lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update t_member_mst
ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT},
MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_NM = #{memberNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MEMBER_STS_CD = #{memberStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JOIN_DT = #{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LEAVE_DT = #{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_CONTACT_DT = #{lastContactDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update t_member_mst set ORG_NO = #{orgNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}, MEMBER_ID_ENC = #{memberIdEnc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_NM = #{memberNm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEMBER_STS_CD = #{memberStsCd,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, JOIN_DT = #{joinDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LEAVE_DT = #{leaveDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_CONTACT_DT = #{lastContactDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, REG_USER_ID = #{regUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REG_DT = #{regDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, LAST_MOD_USER_ID = #{lastModUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, LAST_MOD_DT = #{lastModDt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo,jdbcType=BIGINT}
